summary: Comprehensive testing of newly added Newsletter system (backend + frontend). 18/18 backend pytest cases pass on first clean run. Frontend public pages (/newsletter, /newsletter/:slug, /unsubscribe) and admin Newsletter Center (3 top-level pills + 3 sub-tabs + IssueEditor + Send modal) all render and work correctly. Live Resend test-send to info@orgainse.com returns success:true sent:1 total_recipients:1. Regression on legacy /api/newsletter signup confirmed — new subscribers persist with unsubscribe_token, unsubscribed=false, bounced=false, tags=[].
critical_code_review_comments: Subscriber `unsubscribe_token` is intentionally stripped from API responses by `_sub_to_shape` (good — security). Tests assert against the DB directly to verify persistence. Confirm this is desired behaviour, particularly for the create-subscriber API response (admin UI cannot retrieve the token via API at all once created — only the email link contains it, so any failed send/lost link means the token is unrecoverable via admin UI).
Backend file /app/backend/server.py is now 1769 lines — should be split into modular routers (newsletter_admin, newsletter_public, unsubscribe) for maintainability per the >700-lines guideline.

Public `GET /api/newsletter-issues` (list) and `/api/newsletter-issues?slug=` (detail) share the same path with branching on query — works, but two distinct routes would be clearer and easier to cache.
Send-test endpoint validates only `test_email` truthiness; consider RFC email validation to avoid wasted Resend API calls.
test_credentials: Admin: orgainse_admin / Org@iNs3-Adm!n-2026-x7P9qK (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Resend test recipient: info@orgainse.com (only verified domain).
seed_data_creation: Tests create issues with slug prefix 'test-*', subscribers with 'test_*'/'playwright_*'/'unsubpw_*' emails, segments with 'test-seg-*' — all torn down per test. Final manual sweep run to delete leftover test docs. Production seed issue 'welcome-to-the-orgainse-pulse-issue-01' untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend response shape for newsletter endpoints is wrapper-style: POST/PUT/GET issue returns {success, issue:{...}}, list returns {success, pagination, issues:[...]}; subscriber/segment APIs use the same wrapper pattern. unsubscribe_token is NOT exposed via any admin API response (stripped by _sub_to_shape) — to test unsubscribe end-to-end, fetch the token from MongoDB directly (newsletter_subscriptions collection). The seed published issue slug for public tests is 'welcome-to-the-orgainse-pulse-issue-01'. Resend live send only delivers to info@orgainse.com. Use only test_email mode in send tests to avoid spamming live subscribers.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing flows. Initial test run had 8 failures because pytest expected unwrapped response shapes; rewrote tests to match server.py wrapper shape and to read unsubscribe_token from Mongo (since API strips it). All 18 tests then passed.
